disasm: push    {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, sb, sl, fp, lr}
pop     {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, sb, sl, fp, lr}
andeq   r0, r0, r8, ror ip
andeq   r0, r0, r6, ror ip
andeq   r0, r0, sl, ror ip
andeq   r0, r0, ip, ror ip
andeq   r0, r0, ip, asr ip
andeq   r0, r0, r4, ror ip
push    {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, sb, sl, fp, lr}
pop     {r4, r5, r6, r7, r8, sb, sl, fp, lr}
andeq   r0, r0, r8, ror sl
